generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed into motor voltage commands for adaptive cruise control (ACC) actuation via ROS2 nodes on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles steering adjustments for ACC system via ROS2 lifecycle management on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D point cloud sensor providing object detection data (UST-10LX model) for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth-sensing camera (D435i model) providing visual data for environment perception in ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthData
]

instance Ros2SensorFusion : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "ROS2-based sensor fusion combining LiDAR and camera data via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData FusedObjectTrackingData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction data streams
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance FusedObjectTrackingData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Ros2SensorFusion
]

instance AccControlCommands : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance LiDARClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model for processing LiDAR point clouds in real-time for object detection in ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering model for object tracking in ACC system using fused sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance AccControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant ACC control logic implementing lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing time-series data of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) for ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing time-series data of detected object tracks (position, velocity) for ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DetectedObjectTracks
]

instance 3DVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D CAD-derived visualization data representing vehicle and environment for ACC Digital Twin visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, CameraDepthData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance Ros2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based middleware for inter-entity communication and component orchestration in ACC Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE, PresentationFE, ReportingFE
]

instance NvidiaJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 for hardware abstraction and GPU acceleration on Jetson Orin Nano platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables Ros2SensorFusion, MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for rapid prototyping of ACC Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, ReportingFE
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation validation and control logic development in ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables AccControlLogicModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance DBSCANClustering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud processing in ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARClusteringModel
]

instance KalmanFilter : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering algorithm for object tracking in ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables KalmanFilterModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for storing time-series data of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables EgoVehicleStateDatabase, DetectedObjectTracksDatabase
]

instance Ros2Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based visualization pipeline (RViz2) for 3D rendering of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables PresentationFE
]

// C12: Data Collection FE
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "ROS2-based Data Pre-Processing Feature implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for sensor data processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel
    DTDFVocab:outputTo LiDARPointCloudData, CameraDepthData, FusedObjectTrackingData
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Data Collection Feature aggregating raw sensor data (ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks) from distributed physical components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, Ros2SensorFusion
    DTDFVocab:outputTo AccControlCommands
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 compliant Data Translation Feature ensuring standardized message alignment and unit conversions for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARPointCloudData, CameraDepthData
    DTDFVocab:outputTo AccControlCommands
]

instance PresentationFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Feature rendering CAD-derived vehicle and environment visualizations via ROS2-based visualization pipelines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo 3DVisualizationData
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:FunctionalEntity [
    base:desc "Reporting Feature generating human-readable reports from time-series vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EgoVehicleStateDatabase, DetectedObjectTracksDatabase
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D rendering of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving paths via 3D Visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading service that moves ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) from vehicle ECUs to cloud/Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service enabling operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and trigger emergency braking via Control Panel UI FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ACC efficiency showing fuel economy improvements via predictive maintenance using real-time object detection and ego vehicle state"
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Developer diagnostics using data collection to identify sensor/actuator failures (e.g., LiDAR drift, steering servo issues) in ACC system"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of ACC parameters based on predictive analytics to optimize fuel economy and reduce wear"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote trigger of emergency braking system based on real-time object detection and vehicle state analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC desired speed based on traffic conditions and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves the **ACC Controlling FE** in the Digital Twin Entity, which computes desired speeds based on lead vehicle distance (per ISO 15622, Performance Class I ACC) and sends actuation commands via the **Actuation FE** (ROS2 nodes) to the vehicle’s motor and steering servos. Emergency braking commands are triggered remotely through the **Control Panel UI FE**. Communication uses a **Wi-Fi network** with end-to-end latency ≤ 100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time-scale operates at **real-time granularity**, with data collection and processing synchronized to a **100 ms clock accuracy** (per R6 requirements). The ACC control loop operates at **~10–20 Hz** (adjustments based on lead vehicle distance), while visualization updates occur at **~30 Hz** (for smooth 3D rendering). End-to-end latency between the vehicle and DT Entity is constrained to ≤ 100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation consists of three primary entities (ISO 23247 framework) with custom adaptations:
  1) **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera), actuation (motor/steering), and data preprocessing (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering). Components are deployed as ROS2 packages on the Jetson Orin Nano.
  2) **Digital Twin Entity**: Contains the **Data Collection FE**, **Reporting FE**, **Presentation FE**, and **ACC Controlling FE**, orchestrated via ROS2 nodes. Data is stored in an external SQL database.
  3) **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization FE** (real-time rendering) and **Control Panel UI FE** (remote management commands). Inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with the Physical Twin Entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the **as-designed (ideal)**, **as-manufactured**, and **as-operated** lifecycle stages:
  - **As-designed**: Simulates ACC logic and validates control algorithms via MATLAB/Simulink and ROS2 simulations.
  - **As-manufactured**: Validates sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera) and data preprocessing (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering) on the physical twin.
  - **As-operated**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., emergency braking) during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic (Performance Class I), validated via MATLAB/Simulink simulations.
  - **Validation**: Real-time testing on the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle, with sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera) validated via DBSCAN/Kalman filtering.
  - **Uncertainty Management**: Data preprocessing handles noise in LiDAR/camera data via clustering and filtering. Clock synchronization (±100 ms) ensures event ordering in distributed systems.
  - **Safety**: Emergency braking commands are prioritized over ACC adjustments to prevent accidents. The system adheres to ISO 23247’s safety-critical design principles."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin technical connection uses:
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: ROS2 network (intra-vehicle) and Wi-Fi (vehicle-to-DT Entity) with ≤ 100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Data Protocols**: ROS2 topics (e.g., `/ego_vehicle_state`, `/object_tracks`) and standardized message formats (ISO 23247 Data Translation FE).
  - **Network Architecture**: Centralized DT Entity hosted externally to the vehicle, with distributed Physical Twin Entity components (ROS2 nodes on Jetson Orin Nano)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosted on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer (ROS2 nodes for sensor fusion, actuation).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed externally to the vehicle (cloud/server) with:
    - **Data Storage**: SQL database for storing ego vehicle state and object tracks.
    - **Computation Offloading**: ACC control logic executed off-board to reduce ECU load.
  - **User Entity**: Hosted via web-based UI (3D Visualization + Control Panel) accessible remotely."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Systems**: Leverages 3GPP TS 22.185 for ≤ 100 ms latency with other vehicles (though not explicitly implemented in this case study).
  - **Autonomous Driving Standards**: ISO 15622 (ACC control logic), ISO 23247 (architecture framework).
  - **External Data Systems**: Could integrate with cloud-based fleet coordination or IoT platforms for broader vehicle monitoring."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **shared**:
  - The **Physical Twin Entity** (vehicle owner) owns raw sensor data (LiDAR, camera) and physical actuation commands.
  - The **Digital Twin Entity** (service provider) owns processed data (object tracks, ego vehicle state) and generates reports for monitoring/management.
  - Privacy is handled via **end-to-end encryption** for Wi-Fi communication and **access controls** on the UI (e.g., role-based permissions for operators/developers)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **Architecture**: ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, Part 2 – Reference Architecture), adapted for automotive use.
  - **Communication**: ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) for inter-entity messaging.
  - **Control**: ISO 15622 (Performance Class I Adaptive Cruise Control).
  - **Networking**: 3GPP TS 22.185 (Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication latency requirements).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: ISO/IEC 1588 (PTP) principles for ≤ 100 ms accuracy."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety**: Emergency braking commands are prioritized over ACC adjustments to prevent accidents. The system enforces ≤ 100 ms latency (3GPP compliance) to avoid catastrophic failures.
  - **Cybersecurity**: Wi-Fi communication uses encrypted protocols (e.g., TLS) for data integrity. The UI implements role-based access control (operators vs. developers).
  - **Redundancy**: Data preprocessing (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering) mitigates sensor noise. The Digital Twin Entity acts as a fail-safe for computation offloading.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators must explicitly confirm emergency braking commands via the Control Panel UI, reducing unintended accidents."
]
